thinkprint.tagline: Thinkprint extracts your decision style and turns it into projects you can actually try.
thinkprint.description: The core loop is simple: personality/thinking extraction → Thinkprint generation → 3 fun projects.

status.label: Status
status.note: We prioritize playful hands-on experience over heavy explanation.

items.reflection: Turn those clues into a visible Thinkprint profile
items.declaration: Run fun projects directly with that Thinkprint

items.profiling: No medical diagnosis or clinical labeling
items.alignment: Not a hidden AI control tool

pipeline.title: Flow
pipeline.description: A clear 5-step loop from input to scenario scoring.

extract.title: Your input
extract.description: Start with a real line from your own decision context.

calibrate.title: Extraction
calibrate.description: Extract decision signals and structure your Thinkprint.

deepen.title: AI Me Dating
deepen.description: Check fit and friction points in dialogue first.

compare.title: AI Elon Comparison
compare.description: Then compare your choice and AI Elon's choice side by side.

freeze.title: Hard scenario score
freeze.description: See where your style struggles through scenario scores.

demo.title: Three fun projects
demo.description: No process-heavy flow here. Just three runnable demo projects.

blindDate.title: Fun Project #1 · AI Me Dating
blindDate.description: Run many Thinkprint-to-Thinkprint virtual dates in parallel and discover your hidden personality ideal type.

persona.title: Fun Project #2 · AI Elon Comparison
persona.description: For your regrets and unresolved dilemmas, compare how other Thinkprints (like AI Elon) would solve them.

difficulty.title: Fun Project #3 · Hard Scenarios
difficulty.description: Throw your profile into stressful situations and pre-train for pressure interviews, dating, and difficult conversations.

interactiveDemo.title: Interactive demo
interactiveDemo.description: Pick one of the 3 Fun Projects and watch live simulation output.
interactiveDemo.scoreboardRole: This board changes by project. It is not a global ranking, but a focused diagnosis for strengths and weak zones in the active project.

blindDate.title: Fun Project #1 · AI Me Dating
blindDate.subtitle: Run multiple Thinkprint modes in parallel and test personality interactions.
blindDate.brief: Launch dozens of virtual dates at once and discover a personality ideal type you did not know you had.
blindDate.user: I want someone stable, but not boring to talk with.
blindDate.agent: 32 Thinkprint pairings simulated in parallel. Top matches keep emotional stability while retaining novelty.
blindDate.result: Virtual-date ranking and conflict-trigger report generated.
blindDate.scoreNote: Use this project to discover who your style is actually compatible with.

persona.title: Fun Project #2 · AI Elon Comparison
persona.subtitle: Revisit your regrets and unresolved decisions using another Thinkprint lens.
persona.brief: Take a decision you struggled with and compare your path with what AI Elon-style reasoning would do.
persona.user: I still regret missing that expansion timing.
persona.agent: AI Elon path detected: fast test-and-kill loop with split risk buckets. Your path prioritized stability with longer payback time.
persona.result: My choice vs AI Elon comparison report generated.
persona.scoreNote: Use this project to secure alternative solution frames, not a single 'correct' answer.

difficulty.title: Fun Project #3 · Hard Scenarios
difficulty.subtitle: Stress-test your style across pressure interviews, dating, and difficult conversations.
difficulty.brief: Throw your profile into many scenarios, find where you collapse, and prepare counter-routines in advance.
difficulty.user: I lose pace in pressure interviews and emotionally loaded conversations.
difficulty.agent: Scenario simulation complete: biggest drop appears in high time-pressure plus relational tension combinations.
difficulty.result: Breakdown points and preemptive prep checklist generated.
difficulty.scoreNote: Use this project to preempt failures before real situations happen.

interactiveDemo.insight: The core is experience over explanation: run all three projects and inspect your style in action.

output.title: Technical corner
output.description: Core technical foundations: model design, evidence calibration, and safety constraints.

model.title: Psychology Model
model.description: Built on Dual-Process theory, GDMS/MDMQ decision styles, and sensation-seeking constructs.

evidence.title: Evidence & Calibration
evidence.description: Language evidence is scored with sufficiency thresholds, uncertainty bands, and calibrated methods.

safety.title: Safety & Ethics
safety.description: Strict non-clinical boundary, opt-out support, and crisis short-circuit guardrails.

connection.title: With BufferLine
connection.description: Thinkprint creates your style profile. JDVP measures how that style changes over time.
connection.future: Start fun, then connect to real decision improvement

deck.title: See the Thinkprint deck
deck.description: Focused on what is fun and what you can actually try, not protocol details.
